title: Close approved persona hiring gaps
goal: Implement approved hiring-gap remediations in bounded scope and record closure evidence in hiring artifacts.

steps.text: Load hiring review report and JSONL entry for the target candidate.
Select only AJ-approved gaps for remediation and map each to specific artifact updates.
Draft bounded remediation changes with explicit acceptance checks.
Pause for AJ review before applying structural updates.
Apply approved changes and run validation plus hiring-log checks.
Append updated closure status to hiring report and hiring JSONL stream.
If calibration-related gaps were remediated, run calibration playbook checks.

acceptanceCriteria: Remediation scope is traceable to target artifacts
Hiring report and JSONL entries reflect remediation status
Calibration checks are recorded when applicable

verification.text: Confirm remediation notes reference hiringReviewEntryId and updated artifact list
